title: VidyoTalk Data Standard (.vdtk)
description: Open standard specification for universal video intelligence metadata sidecar files.

vdtkVersion.description: The major/minor release version of the specification standard (e.g., '1.0.0').

mediaSignature.description: Cryptographic or source identifier of the target video tracking file.

lensTimeline.description: Chronological manifest of deep multi-lens intelligence events.

timestamp.description: Exact video timeframe formatted strictly as HH:MM:SS.mm (or .mmm)

lensToken.description: The secure, obfuscated classification hash indicating which lens triggered.

coordinates.description: Optional bounding box geometry for frame targets [X, Y, Width, Height]
